title: Auto Bucket Clutch
description: Automatically uses a water bucket to clutch when falling!
body:
About

Automatically uses a water bucket to clutch when falling! Comes with a bunch of extra configs.

Features

  • Toggle automatic water bucket placing when you're falling to stop taking fall damage
  • Hotkey to quickly switch a bucket into your hand
  • Configure activation height, auto pickup, preffered slots and more with Mod Menu!

Compatibility

Version Loader Supported?
1.21 to 1.21.1 Fabric ✔
1.21 to 1.21.1 Forge / NeoForge / Other ✘
1.20.X and below Fabric / NeoForge / Forge / Other ✘
1.21.2 and above Fabric / NeoForge / Forge / Other ✘

Dependencies

  • Requires Fabric API
  • Requires Mod Menu
  • Requires Cloth Config

Installation

  1. Install Fabric Loader for any supported version

  2. Download dependecies ^

  3. Download mod from Modrinth or CurseForge
  4. Place the API and mod file into your mods folder
  5. Launch the game using the Fabric profile

Credits

  • Made by CaptainDude

FAQ

**Q: How do I turn on and off?** A: Default on/off hotkey is G. Look in the vanilla hotkeys menu to change **Q: How do I configure?** A: Using Mod Menu, in the mod menu hover over the Auto Bucket Clutch icon and press the configure icon, which will open the configuration menu.
